home.heroSubtitle: Short-stay apartments for holidays or remote work
home.feature1Desc: Direct, personalised attention. We welcome you in person on arrival and stay available throughout your stay.
home.feature2Desc: Apartments in the most strategic areas of Marbella so you can walk everywhere.
home.feature3Desc: Carefully designed spaces, lovingly equipped to offer maximum comfort and a homely warmth.
home.marBio: I love taking care of every detail to make your stay in Marbella special. My goal is that you don't just rent an apartment, but discover the soul of the city with the peace of mind of feeling at home.
home.marQuote: My goal is for you to feel at home from the very first moment.

apartmentsPage.subtitle: 5 unique apartments in the heart of Marbella, managed with care.

detail.cancellationShort1: · Free cancellation up to 5 days before arrival
detail.cancellationShort2: · 50% refund between 5 days before and arrival
detail.cancellationShort3: · No refund from the arrival day
detail.cancellationLong1: · Free cancellation up to 30 days before
detail.cancellationLong2: · First 30 nights non-refundable if you cancel afterwards
detail.cancellationLong3: · No refund from the arrival day

informacion.title: Information & Tips
informacion.subtitle: Guides, tips and articles about Marbella. Everything you need to make the most of your stay.
informacion.heroSubtitle: Guides, restaurants, beaches and everything you need to make the most of your stay.
informacion.empty: Coming soon — articles and guides about Marbella.

normas.title: House rules
normas.subtitle: So everyone enjoys a pleasant stay.
normas.maxGuests: Respect the maximum number of guests indicated for each apartment
normas.quietHours: Quiet hours between 10:00 PM and 8:00 AM
normas.care1: Treat the apartment as if it were your home
normas.care2: Report any issue as soon as possible

registro.title: Traveller registration
registro.subtitle: By regulation, we need the details of all guests before arrival.
registro.info: You'll receive a link to complete the traveller registration after confirming your booking. If you have any questions, contact us directly.
